title: ABC 61250 e Altre
subtitle: Progetto di Aurora Pelaggi e Matteo Mariangioli
description:
Combinatorial script and consulting for the recombination of the headlines of different newspapers from the Marche region.

“So what happens if an absolutely popular piece of news, which is nothing more than a set of lines, is fed into a combinatorial machine that makes it possible to generate infinite combinations?”
(From the book introduction)
